title: Create StatsLedge Design Token System
description: Replace per-page :root blocks with unified tokens across all 11 dashboard HTML files. Spacing scale (8px base), typography (12px floor), border-radius (4 tiers), unified colors (Lab cyberpunk canonical, MC retires iOS blue #0a84ff), unified fonts (Orbitron/Space Grotesk/JetBrains Mono — MC retires Inter/Cinzel), transitions, elevation, layout tokens. Fix --text-tertiary contrast from #484f58 (2.6:1 FAIL) to #6e7681 (~4.5:1 PASS).

florentino_gate.reason: UX overhaul is critical path for product quality. Approved per TKT-159 audit findings.

2026-02-28T12:00:00Z.detail: Implemented as part of StatsLedge UX Overhaul (TKT-267 through TKT-280). All 20 QA checks pass.
